label: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 9

extraction.one_line_summary: CARUSO Damiano soloed from breakaway over Alto Collado Venta Luisa to win atop Velefique, while ROGLIC extended GC lead by covering MASS attack.
tactical_patterns: YATES Adam's attack on Velefique forced ROGLIC to burn matches, but MASS capitalized by counterattacking after settling.
INEOS set relentless pace on Venta Luisa specifically to shake GC contenders, revealing they're targeting podium not stage.
BOUCHARD Geoffrey bridging from GC group to breakaway on descent shows INEOS overcooked their pace selection.
ROGLIC chased bonus seconds at finish despite having teammates nearby, signaling comfort managing effort personally over delegating.

rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: Destroyed breakaway on Venta Luisa then held 1:05 gap solo, suggesting he's peaked for grand tour mountain stages
rider_signals.BERNAL Egan: negative: Dropped heavily on Velefique losing 2:10, requiring nursemaiding earlier by PAUWELS/PARDOEN shows premature GC ambitions
rider_signals.YATES Adam: neutral: Initiated winning move but couldn't follow MASS counter, confirms he's explosive but lacks diesel for sustained efforts
rider_signals.MASS Primoz: positive: Only rider matching ROGLIC after YATES attack, counterattack distanced YATES, closed 28s gap suggests genuine GC threat
rider_signals.LOPEZ Miguel Angel: positive: Bridged to YATES group then attacked again, showing recovery capacity absent in many GC riders
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Dropped chain chasing CARUSO ruined KOM bid, mechanical but reveals thin margins in his current form
